summary: Command Center Performance Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend: 9/9 panels verified. Split 4 parallel endpoints (/fleet, /risk, /incidents, /environment) load in ~3.8s vs sequential ~10.5s (64% faster). Old /command-center endpoint still works (backward compat).

test_categories.auth_tests: 4 PASS - All 4 endpoints return 401 without auth
test_categories.fleet_endpoint: 3 PASS - returns fleet_safety object with score/status/devices + evolution_shifts, <10s
test_categories.incidents_endpoint: 1 PASS - returns active_incidents array with severity badges
test_categories.performance: 1 PASS - parallel load faster than sequential

frontend.cc-fleet-safety: PASS - Fleet Safety Score panel with score ring (86.4) and device list
frontend.cc-active-incidents: PASS - Active Incidents panel showing 20 active with severity badges
frontend.cc-predictive-alerts: PASS - Predictive Alerts panel showing 15 alerts
frontend.cc-environment-status: PASS - Environmental Risk panel with device scores
frontend.cc-refresh: PASS - Refresh button works, triggers reload

performance_measurements.note: Fleet endpoint was optimized from 72+ sequential DB queries to 8 batch queries

frontend_ui.title: Nagarik Command Center
frontend_ui.subtitle: Unified intelligence — what happened, what will happen, what is deteriorating
frontend_ui.panels_layout: 2-column grid with Fleet/Forecast left, Incidents/Alerts right, then 3-col bottom row

critical_code_review_comments: Fleet safety uses batch queries in safety_score_engine.py (7 queries vs 72+ per-device)
Frontend uses Promise.allSettled for parallel API calls with independent loading states
Each panel shows loading spinner independently until its data arrives
Header badges derive counts from loaded data (incidents, risk, shifts)
Old /command-center endpoint preserved for backward compatibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center performance optimization complete. 4 split endpoints (/fleet, /risk, /incidents, /environment) load in parallel (~4s total) instead of monolithic ~20s. Backend uses batch queries in safety_score_engine.py. Frontend uses Promise.allSettled in CommandCenter.jsx. All data-testid attributes implemented for testing.
